title: Employee Onboarding
description: Comprehensive employee onboarding playbook covering pre-boarding, first day, first week, 30/60/90 day milestones. Ensures new hires are set up for success.
message_on_join:
**Welcome to the Team!**

This channel is your onboarding hub. Your manager and onboarding buddy will guide you through everything you need to get started.

**Your Onboarding Team:**
- Manager: @[to be assigned]
- Onboarding Buddy: @[to be assigned]
- HR Contact: @[to be assigned]

**Key Resources:**
- Employee Handbook: [Link]
- IT Setup Guide: [Link]
- Benefits Information: [Link]

Don't hesitate to ask questions here!

retrospective_template:
### 90-Day Onboarding Review

### New Hire Feedback
- What went well during onboarding?
- What could have been better?
- What information was missing?
- How prepared do you feel for your role?

### Manager Assessment
- Is the new hire meeting expectations?
- What additional support is needed?
- Any concerns to address?

### Metrics
- Time to first contribution: ___ days
- Training completion: ___%
- 30-day check-in rating: ___/5
- 60-day check-in rating: ___/5
- 90-day check-in rating: ___/5

### Process Improvements
- What should we change in the onboarding process?
- Resources to add or update?

### Next Steps
- Development goals for next quarter
- Training opportunities
- Career path discussion scheduled

items.title: Send offer letter and collect signed documents
Set up accounts: Slack, Mattermost, HRIS
Add to relevant email distribution lists
Send welcome email with first day instructions
Notify team of new hire start date
Add profile photo to company systems
Tour office or virtual workspace overview
Review org chart and key contacts
Set up voicemail and communication tools
End of day check-in with manager
Set up 1:1 meeting cadence with manager
Access all necessary tools and systems
First small project or task assigned
QUESTION: How is the role matching expectations?
QUESTION: What additional support is needed?
Set goals for final 30 days of onboarding
